productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Derby II White Sports Shoes
description: The adidas derby II have a simplistic, stylish design featuring the adidas 3 stripes in a distinctive style to either side along with the adidas logos to the outer heel, heel counter and tongue. Featuring Vibe Complete comfort around the ankle, underfoot, and in those high-wear areas, they give you the comfort you need to attack the day with. The contrast synthetic Adidas trademark three stripes signifying a mountain, pointing out towards the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved add a touch of gravity to the shoes.UpperComplete leather upper for pefessional usageSynthetic textile lining for great durabilityCentral lace-up Fit for comfortable customised fitPadded tongue and collar for snug fitAdidas branding on synthetic patch over heel cupMidsoleFull length phylon midsole for lightweight structureVibeComplete enhanced cushioning on the insole for a comfortable feelSoft, cushy footbed for great comfort all dayOutsoleExternal heel counter provides even more ankle protectionRubber outsole provides abrasion resistant support and protection for whole footHigh-traction tread pattern equipped with pivot point for maximum mobilityshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shineStore away from sunlight
